title: Shiny Logo
description: Made Minecraft logo shiny and golden from scratch!
body:
# Shiny Minecraft Logo
Made Minecraft Logo Appear Shiny from Scratch!


If you like this resource pack, check out my other projects!


## NOTE
- Entirely original logo — no Mojang assets were used.
- Created in [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/) with the Minecraft Title plugin.
